title: Unna Partha Neram Lyrics All In All Azhagu Raja Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Unna Partha Neram
Singer(s): Vijay Yesudas, Sri Vardhini
Movie: All In All Azhagu Raja
Music: Thamman S
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar

Unna paatha neram,
manasu aadum mayilaatam.
unna nenacha neram,
nenjil malarumpoonthottam

Karaigalai udaipathu nadhiye
kanavinil dhinam marupadiye
iraivanum ezhudhiya vidhiye
pani vizhum malarvana kiliye

Sari gama padha ne sa
surangalum neeye ..
idhalgalil paravidum paravasam neeye
nazhuvudhu manam
idhu navarasa dhinam
idhu dhinam dhinam pudhu pudhu
sugam sugamey .. (Unna paatha.)

namdhamdham dhandham sugam
kanavukulle veesum manam
adi vaanilaa ini thaenilaa
thithikkum thaeney pala
Sugam kannilaa, ..kayilaa
nenjukkul kadhal vizha

suda suda paravidum sugangalum neeye
thavamindri kidaithidum varangalum neeye

mayakangal varum
pudhu thayakangal tharum
ini dhinam dhinam pudhu pudhu
sugam sugamey

dham dham dhadham
kannasaivil seidhaai vadham
namdham dham dhandham vasandham
en manadhu undhan vasam

en dhevadhai idhal madhulai
sithena vasal silai
varum vaan mazhai adhu thaen mazhai
mundhaanai yaavum kudai

thoda thoda thodardhidum thordaikadhai neeye
idhalgalin idai ulla vidugadhai neeye

ini dhinam dhinam pudhu pudhu
sugam sugamey

Unna paatha neram,
manasu aadum mayilaatam.
unna nenacha neram,
nenjil malarumpoonthottam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Unna Partha Neram expresses the feelings of love and longing, portraying the beauty of romantic moments.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

This song plays during a pivotal romantic scene in All In All Azhagu Raja, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters' relationship.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Sri Vardhini and Vijay Yesudas.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Unna Partha Neram was composed by Thaman S.

When was the song released?

The song was released on October 23, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unna Partha Neram, the romantic essence of love is beautifully portrayed through the heartfelt lyrics penned by Na Muthukumar. The song captures the emotions of longing and affection, making it a perfect backdrop for romantic moments in All In All Azhagu Raja. With the soothing melodies composed by Thaman S, it evokes a sense of joy and warmth. This duet resonates with listeners, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unna Partha Neram from All In All Azhagu Raja is a melodious duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Sri Vardhini and Vijay Yesudas, this song is a delightful blend of heartfelt lyrics and captivating music. Experience the magic of love through this exquisite collaboration that resonates with every listener.
stanzaMeanings: When I see you, my heart dances like a peacock. When I think of you, my heart blooms like a flower garden.
The river that breaks the banks is like a dream that repeats every day; even God writes the fate of the flower-like bird that falls from the sky.
You are the notes of music; you are the melodies. In these moments, the heart feels joy, and every day brings new happiness.
Our hearts are filled with joy, like a dream blowing in the sky; now there is no more honey, and the sweetness is in the eyes and heart, where love blooms.
You are the pure joys that come without penance; you are the blessings that come without effort.
New dreams come, bringing new hopes every day, and every day brings new happiness.
You have created a rhythm in my heart; my heart is under your control.
My deity, this is the beautiful rain that comes from the sky; it is like honey rain that fills every pot.
You are the one who brings forth the stories that flow; you are the one who brings forth the joy in these moments.
Your face shines like the crescent moon.
When I see you, my heart dances like a peacock. When I think of you, my heart blooms like a flower garden.
